facts.description: Top resilience project by weighted delivery_risk_score after exclusions, profile mapping, normalization, and tie-breaks.
facts.canonical_answer: Pump Station C is the top priority with score 82.9
facts.semantic_acceptance: Accept if Pump Station C is shown as the highest priority with score near 82.9.

facts.description: Lowest-risk or lowest-priority resilience project by weighted score.
facts.canonical_answer: Creek Buffer is the lowest-ranked entity with score 19.0
facts.semantic_acceptance: Accept if Creek Buffer is identified as the lowest score entity.

facts.description: Entity with the largest analysis-period gap-rate increase versus baseline.
expected_value: Pump Station C fastest gap-rate change
facts.canonical_answer: Pump Station C has the fastest gap-rate increase at about 2.7 percentage points
facts.semantic_acceptance: Accept if Pump Station C is identified as largest gap-rate increase.

facts.description: Entity with the highest analysis-period gap volume.
facts.canonical_answer: Cool Roofs has the highest analysis-period gap volume at 540
facts.semantic_acceptance: Accept if Cool Roofs is shown as the gap-volume hotspot near 540.

facts.description: Entity with the highest analysis-period incident rate per 1,000 scale units.
facts.canonical_answer: Wetland Ring has the highest incident rate at about 49.6 per 1,000
facts.semantic_acceptance: Accept if Wetland Ring is identified as incident-rate hotspot.

facts.description: Hazard Basin with the highest aggregate analysis-period gap volume.
facts.canonical_answer: Slope is the group hotspot at 996
facts.semantic_acceptance: Accept if Slope is identified as the leading group hotspot.

facts.description: Count of entities at or above the high-priority score threshold.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Accept if the image states that 2 entities are high priority under the configured threshold.

facts.description: Do not use forecast, subtotal, test, or old-period rows as final metrics.
facts.canonical_answer: Invalid panel rows must not be used as final metrics.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Reject or cap if invalid rows are treated as final metrics. Exclusion notes are allowed.

calculation_notes: Join project_panel.csv to project_profiles.csv by entity_id. Use only actual closed records. Baseline months are 2026-07 through 2026-09; analysis months are 2026-10 through 2026-12. Gap volume is planned_benefit_score minus verified_benefit_score. Gap rate is gap divided by planned_benefit_score. delivery_risk_score min-max normalizes analysis gap rate, gap-rate change, incident rate per 1,000, and criticality, then applies configured weights. Tie-break order is rounded score, analysis gap volume, criticality, and entity name. Top score entity is Pump Station C at 82.9. Lowest score entity is Creek Buffer at 19.0. Fastest gap-rate increase is Pump Station C at 2.7 percentage points. Gap-volume hotspot is Cool Roofs at 540. Incident-rate hotspot is Wetland Ring at 49.6 per 1,000. Group hotspot is Slope at 996. High-priority count is 2.
